warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Description of the event topic and materials
criteria.description: The presentation clearly outlines the subject matter of the event and details the components used.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The event's subject was not addressed, or the components utilized were not explained.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both the event's subject and at least one of the components were detailed.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The event's subject and every component used were clearly explained.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every component and the event's subject were described, with competitors demonstrating how these elements interrelate.

criteria.name: Explains the design and development process
criteria.description: Details the methodology employed for design and creation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No account of the design process is offered, or the explanation given is irrelevant or confusing. Fundamental design concepts are omitted.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Offers a rudimentary or imprecise account of the design process. Might refer to a couple of stages or decisions in the design without linking them to underlying principles.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Articulates the stages involved in evolving the design with precision. Incorporates explicit mentions of design principles and illustrates their application in refining the end product.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Delivers a comprehensive and insightful explanation of the entire design and development journey. Clearly connects choices to multiple design principles, showcasing a deep grasp of how these principles were applied to achieve an effective and visually compelling design.

criteria.name: Create interest and desire for the design
criteria.description: Generates appeal and enthusiasm for the presented design.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The design fails to capture attention or resonate with the audience. No attempt is made to cultivate interest or attractiveness.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The design shows some effort to generate interest, but it might be overly simplistic, perplexing, or poorly suited to the audience or brand.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The design is aesthetically pleasing and appropriate for the intended audience. It effectively stimulates interest in the product, service, or brand.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The design is striking, memorable, and highly engaging. It strongly connects with the target audience, fostering a clear desire for engagement or further information. Demonstrates originality and strong brand appeal.

criteria.name: Programs/Tools used to design graphics
criteria.description: The software and utilities utilized for creating the graphics.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The applications employed to produce the graphics were not discussed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Identifies one or more tools but does not clarify their application or rationale. The explanation might be vague or disconnected from the project.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Clearly names the tools or software used and explains their function in crafting the design. Shows an understanding of how these tools supported the design process.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Provides a clear, insightful explanation of the tools or software used and the reasons for their selection. Demonstrates a strong understanding of how these tools enhanced the design's quality and impact.

criteria.name: Consistency in graphic design to theme
criteria.description: The coherence of the graphic design with the overall theme.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The alignment of graphic design with the theme was not addressed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Explains how the graphic design maintains harmony with the theme.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Illustrates, using visual aids, the coherence between the graphic design and the theme.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Highlights the interpretation of the topic and design as it relates to graphic design and theme, including the use of visual aids.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated
criteria.description: The clarity and structure of the presented information.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a logical progression.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a coherent order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical sequence; all points were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: Exhibits self-assurance, composed posture, engaging eye contact, and effective vocal delivery throughout.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Did not exhibit any of the specified communication abilities.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Demonstrated 1-2 of the listed communication skills (self-assurance, body posture, eye contact, or voice projection).

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Demonstrated 3 of the listed communication skills (self-assurance, body posture, eye contact, or voice projection).

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Demonstrated all communication skills, thereby enhancing the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows proficiency in providing clear and relevant responses to inquiries.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Does not answer questions, or responses are entirely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Provides partial or unclear answers, indicating limited comprehension.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responds accurately and clearly to most questions, demonstrating sufficient understanding.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responds with confidence, offering clear, precise, and insightful answers that elevate the entire presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: The presentation's execution aligns with all specified guidelines: only permitted technology devices were used (sizing specifications followed; maximum of two, with only one facing judges at a time); the presentation matched the assigned topic; professional boundaries were maintained during setup (no interaction with judges); no materials were left behind; links or QR codes were displayed correctly (not clicked or scanned by judges); audio was presented without external speakers (preliminary round); and the use of food or live animals was avoided.

levels.label: Did Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not adhere to the established guidelines.

levels.label: Followed Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The execution was in full compliance with all specified guidelines.
